name: Algomon (Perfect)

signature_move.name: Elimination Line
signature_move.description: Fires a beam from the eyes on its limbs or electrocutes an enemy with its vines.

description: Current Original ⇨ Japanese A Digimon that was generated from a bug in an algorithm. Due to its high-speed processing ability, it uses its countless ivy tendrils as tentacles, and takes complete control of a vast field. Its Special Moves are using its tentacles to constrict the opponent's powers, completely restricting its movement ( Imprisonment ), and an erasing beam fired from the eyes on its limbs ( Elimination Line ). Also, when it takes control of a vast field it transforms into a parasite called " Worm Phase ".
